summary: The session focused on strategies for overcoming customer objections when selling memberships at Hand & Stone Massage and Facial Spa, particularly addressing concerns about affordability. The assistant provided a detailed script to help sales associates effectively communicate the value of the membership program.
facts: The user is interested in sales techniques for Hand & Stone Massage and Facial Spa. The user discussed overcoming customer objections related to affordability when selling memberships. The assistant suggested acknowledging customer concerns and explaining the long-term savings and benefits of the membership program. The assistant provided a script for responding to customers who express doubts about affordability. The membership program allows sharing benefits with a family member or friend. The assistant emphasized customizing membership plans to fit different budgets and lifestyles. The assistant highlighted the importance of prioritizing self-care as part of the membership's value.
